data.title: Gotrax Baby Balance Bike 1-2 Years, 7" Front&Rear Silent Wheels, Sturdy Steel Frame 66 lbs Load, Quick 2-Min Assembly, CPC Ce

features: Stable & Secure Ride: 7" Front & Rear Silent Big 4-Wheels provide spacing to deliver ample legroom. Designed with a 5.1-inch front wheel spacing &1.45-inch wheel width and 45° limited steering for enhanced stability and anti-tip safety.
Sturdy Steel Frame: Durable steel alloy frame ensures long-lasting stability and strength. Supports up to 66 lbs
perfect for most toddlers.
Safe For Exploring: The Gotrax toddler balance bike features a soft-edge design that provides all-around protection as toddlers explore. Designed as a first ride on toy for 1-2year-olds
it protects against bumps and scrapes.
Quick Assembly: Assembles in just 2 minutes with a precision-locking system for stability and safety. One-click disassembly makes storage simple. Weighing 5.9 lbs
it’s so lightweight that your baby can ride it with ease
whether indoors or outdoors.
High-Quality: Crafted with a one-piece TPR solf handle
ergonomic curved comfortable soft seat
and EVA silent wheels for durability and comfort. The mini fan turns every ride into fun
helping kids build balance
coordination
confidence with every step.
First Bike for 1-Year-Olds: The Gotrax BA1 Baby Balance Bike is designed for toddlers ages 12–24 months to safely learn standing
walking
and riding
making it a safe
fun
and easy-to-use first birthday gift for your little one.
Reliable Choice: The Gotrax BA1 Infant Balance Bike is CPC certified
Please use with confidence. It comes with a 1-year warranty and 24
7 customer support
letting you peace of mind when purchasing and using the bike—truly a great choice.

Sections.Title: Umatoll bike
Texts: No need to be timid, no need to turn your head. Be brave and start stepping out in front! We hope that every baby can grow up healthy and happy! We believe toys are not just playmates but essential partners in a child's development. Umatoll accompanies the growth of the baby and records the beautiful moments of the baby!
